name: sessions_generate_summary
description: Generate an AI-powered summary of a session including key events, frustration signals, and outcomes.

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: The session ID to generate a summary for.

body.summary: A 2-minute session from a Chrome/macOS user who visited 3 pages. The user showed frustration on the checkout page with 2 rage clicks and 1 error click before abandoning.
